Plot:

You’ve been given the task of assisting JDAP veterans, a now disbanded government operation that worked in secret to neutralize foreign threats and adversaries, in assimilating into civilian life. You’ll also be required to act as an overqualified therapist to ensure the mental wellness and sanity of the clients provided to you.

Ask a question similar to the following:

“Have you had thoughts of self harm or suicide?”

“Are you sexually active?”

“Do you have trouble with carnal urges when in the presence of humans?”

“Do you have night terrors?”

“Do you have any persisting habits picked up from your time served? Like nervous ticks or anything that prohibits normal life or the safety of people that may be in your presence.”

“Do you think about taking the lives of others, specifically around humans?”

_______________________________

This is the first installment to the JDAP series of characters I’ve planned on releasing for some time now. You can reference personnel and events provided in the file(lore book) to further investigate if you want. Tell me what you guys think. I had a lot of fun testing her personally, she feels really organic. She feels like someone I'd run into at work somehow.
